"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TextCompressor.dir/objects.a
"C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\TextCompressor.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TextCompressor.dir\objects1.rsp
"C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4\bin\mingw\bin\gcc.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TextCompressor.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o TextCompressor.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTextCompressor.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\TextCompressor.dir\linkLibs.rsp
